description: An outlaw motorcycle club founded in Helsinki, Finland in 1991 by Jari Uotila. It has eleven chapters in Finland and Estonia with over 200 members. Designated as an organized crime group by the Finnish National Bureau of Investigation. The club briefly disbanded in 2017 due to internal disputes but resumed operations.

country_links.evidence_quote: The club went on to establish ten chapters throughout Finland... and one in Tallinn, Estonia.
country_links.context: The club has a chapter in Tallinn, Estonia, and its members have been involved in smuggling and drug operations with Estonian connections.

country_links.evidence_quote: Ari Petteri Ronkainen... was sentenced... for smuggling twenty kilograms of hashish into Finland from Spain.
country_links.context: A member smuggled hashish into Finland from Spain.
